items.title: Go 1.24 Release Candidate 2
items.content:
• VHS 0.9 – CLI 'home video recorder'. "Write terminal GIFs as code for integration testing and demoing your CLI tools." v0.9 adds a keyword for waiting for certain conditions before continuing .

  • 🤖 Mods 1.7 – Charm's pipeline-able AI CLI client. Now with improved GitHub Copilot support and OpenAI o1 support.

  • ☎︎ phonenumbers 1.5 – Go port of Google's libphonenumber library for parsing and validating phone numbers.

  • GoReleaser 2.6 – Build/release binaries for multiple platforms. v2.6 gains Bun and Deno support.

  • Notify 1.3 – Library to send notifications to various services.

  • sqlc 1.28 – Generate type-safe Go code from SQL.

items.title: An interactive tour of Go 1.24
items.content: 📄 Making 'Beautiful' API Keys – Making auth tokens/keys more attractive probably shouldn’t be a priority, but if you want/need to, uuidkey may be for you. Jack Spirou (AgentStation)
